content: TAE Aerospace can support all your PT6A maintenance needs, even providing field service for on-wing events like Hot Section Inspections. We have an experienced team ready to serve you to keep you flying.
Good evening, I am looking to purchase CFM56-5C2 Qty: 2, PW121A Qty: 1. Open to any cycles remaining but the more cycles the better. Please DM if you have any options available.

We have an Airbus A320neo available for lease starting Q2 2026. Aircraft is currently on lease with a major European carrier, coming off lease in May 2026. Excellent condition, full maintenance records available.
Our facility in Singapore now offers comprehensive CFM56-7B engine overhaul services with 60-day turnaround time. EASA and FAA certified. Specializing in hot section inspections and component repair.
Available from stock: Boeing 737NG landing gear components. Full shipset available for immediate delivery. All parts come with full traceability and dual certification (EASA/FAA).
Seeking investors for aircraft acquisition fund targeting mid-life narrowbody aircraft. Target IRR 12-15%. Minimum investment $500k. Focus on A320ceo and 737NG aircraft.
Boeing 757-200F available for sale or lease. Cargo configuration, excellent maintenance history. Suitable for express cargo or charter operations.
Offering aircraft technical management services for lessors and investors. Specializing in lease transition management, technical inspections, and asset value preservation.
CFM56-5B engine available for lease with 12-month minimum term. Engine currently on-wing with European operator, coming off lease in June 2026.
Available: Airbus A320 cabin refurbishment packages. Includes new seats, sidewalls, carpets, and IFE systems. Turnkey solution with 45-day installation timeline.
New EASA regulations for UAV operations in controlled airspace. We offer compliance consulting and certification support for drone operators entering commercial aviation market.
Urgent sale: Pratt & Whitney PW4000 engine parts. Overhauled condition, immediate availability. Includes HPT blades, LPT vanes, and combustion chamber components.
